## Summary

Describe the capability you would like to add.

## Motivation

What modeling, validation, or export problem would this solve?

## Proposed shape

If you have an idea, outline the expected YAML, CLI, validation, or export impact.

## Additional context

Link related issues, examples, or constraints if available.
